summary: Hemolytic anemia stimulates a robust reticulocyte response due to accelerated red blood cell breakdown and subsequent need for replacement; thus, this condition most reliably shows persistent elevated levels of immature red blood cells indicative of high hematopoietic output necessary under such stress conditions. \boxed{\text{Hemolytic Anemia}}

Answer choice: A
